author_rating_explanation: Both authors are affiliated with AI Foundations, Capital One. Capital One is a major financial company with an AI research division, which qualifies as a concrete industry research lab with verifiable output (OpenAlex cited_by_count=1758 for first author). This places the paper in the 6-8 band as a recognized industry research group, though not a top-tier AI company like DeepMind or OpenAI.

author_profiles.name: Erin Babinsky
